step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the conclusion provided earlier. One additional point is that CA-125 levels can also fluctuate based on factors unrelated to ovarian cancer, which further limits its utility in routine screenings where consistency and reliability are crucial. This makes office endometrial aspirations and pap smears preferable given their higher accuracy rates and established track records in cervical and breast cancer detection respectively.
